criteria.label: Build and inspect paths with Path and the / operator (name, stem, suffix, parent).
criteria.example:
```python
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('data') / 'docs' / 'paper.pdf'
p.name      # 'paper.pdf'
p.stem      # 'paper'
p.suffix    # '.pdf'
p.parent    # Path('data/docs')
```

criteria.label: Read and write files and create directory trees with pathlib.
criteria.example:
```python
out = Path('build/reports/q4.txt')
out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
out.write_text('hello', encoding='utf-8')
text = out.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
```

criteria.label: Read configuration and secrets from os.environ with defaults and fail-fast checks.
criteria.example:
```python
import os
DEBUG = os.environ.get('DEBUG', '0') == '1'
API_KEY = os.environ['OPENAI_API_KEY']  # KeyError → fail fast at startup
```

criteria.label: Glob a document tree and decide when to stream large files instead of read_text.
criteria.example:
```python
for p in Path('docs').rglob('*.md'):
    if p.stat().st_size > 50_000_000:        # > 50 MB → stream
        with p.open('r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f: process(line)
    else:                                     # small → read it all
        process_all(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
```
